/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libftpclient.so.1 -o libftpclient.so.1.0.0 CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/ftpclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/security/CredentialVault.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/security/TlsTransport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/security/OpenSSLInit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/security/SecretProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/transfer/BufferPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/transfer/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/transfer/ResultAggregator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/transfer/TransferEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/resilience/RetryPolicy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/resilience/CircuitBreaker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/resilience/StallDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/resilience/IdempotencyClassifier.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ftpclient.dir/src/resilience/ResilienceController.cpp.o  -lpthread -lssl -lcrypto
